name: Hellfire Vigil
description:
“My darlings. Before you know your own name, before you see the sky, before you even take your first breath, do you know who knows you? Your mother. You blink into existence, and your heart beats nestled beneath hers. My loves, we were children of Krakoa eons before any of us stepped foot on her soil. Bound not by territory, by citizenship or by resurrection. Our bond with Krakoa precedes all knowing, all language, all else. Place your hands over your hearts, beloveds. As long as one heart yet beats, she endures. Krakoa lives!” - Emma Frost

One year ago, at the final Hellfire Gala on Krakoa, the dream of a unified mutant nation was forever shattered by a cowardly sneak attack by anti-mutant forces. To mark the moment and to proclaim loudly and strongly to all concerned that mutantkind still stands, the time has come for X-Men of all stripes to come together in solidarity and celebration.

Emma Frost

Jean Grey

Rogue

Psylocke(Kwannon)

Magik

Storm

Mystique

Sophie Cuckoo

Dazzler

Polaris

Kitty Pryde

Jubilee
creator: Dark.Redbird
